In the mutant, it's adding instead of multiplying. That seems incorrect because if you have an offset in milliseconds and you've already extracted the number of whole seconds (seconds variable), subtracting the sum would not correctly adjust the offset for further processing. The lines around 279-285 are part of the same method (probably in DateTimeZone's toString() or similar), so changing line 282 affects the subsequent processing.
